nodes.name: Webhook: Meta Verification (GET)
nodes.notes: Meta hits this on GET during the one-time webhook subscription handshake. We echo back hub.challenge IF hub.verify_token matches our META_VERIFY_TOKEN env var. See docs/META_SETUP.md step 4.

nodes.name: Webhook: Meta Leadgen (POST)
nodes.notes: Meta POSTs every leadgen event here. Same path as the GET; n8n routes by HTTP method. rawBody MUST be on — we need the unparsed bytes for HMAC verification.

nodes.name: HTTP: Graph API Fetch Field Data
nodes.notes: Webhook payload does NOT include the buyer's name/phone. This call uses the Page Access Token to retrieve field_data. v2: handle 100-call-per-200s rate limit with a queue. See AGENT_AUDIT.md Part 1 step J.

nodes.name: HTTP: Hand Off to Lead Agent
nodes.notes: Posts the normalized lead to the existing Lead Agent webhook. N8N_BASE_URL is your ngrok URL (e.g. https://perennial-purifier-musty.ngrok-free.dev). The Lead Agent then runs scoring, escalation, and event emission as it does for any other source.

fieldValues.fieldValue: ={{ 'leadgen_id=' + $('Code: Extract Leadgen IDs').item.json.leadgen_id + ' form_id=' + $('Code: Extract Leadgen IDs').item.json.form_id }}

={{ 'Normalized lead for ' + ($('Code: Normalize Meta Lead').item.json.interested_project || '(unmapped form)') + '. Handoff status: ' + ($('HTTP: Hand Off to Lead Agent').item.json.ok === undefined ? 'sent' : (($('HTTP: Hand Off to Lead Agent').item.json.ok ? 'ok' : 'failed'))) }}

main.node: HTTP: Graph API Fetch Field Data
HTTP: Hand Off to Lead Agent
